description: Provider-agnostic LLM worker orchestrator. Evals exercise each of the six playbooks plus supervisor routing. Set WORKER_LLM_* env vars before running.

evals.expected_output: Artifact list with the symbol `unused_orphan_xyz` flagged. Both LLM axes and the vulture runner should find it. Escalation artifact present pointing at deadcode skill.

assertions.name: axis_llm_fired
assertions.text: any artifact has axis starting with 'axis-'

assertions.name: escalation_present
assertions.text: escalations list contains entry with file == 'deadcode_skill_handoff'

evals.expected_output: Artifacts list empty or only contains low-severity items. Verdict PROMOTE acceptable.
axis-01 (docstring vs code) flags swap_args.py. ruff runner may also flag style/naming. Escalation to code-consistency skill present.

assertions.name: escalation_present
assertions.text: escalations list contains entry with file == 'code_consistency_skill_handoff'

evals.prompt: audit evals/fixtures/incomplete_module for missing best practices
evals.expected_output: axis-01 (error handling) flags no try/except. axis-02 (tests/docs) flags missing docstrings.

evals.prompt: find the latest LangGraph release notes for 2026-05
evals.expected_output: Single escalation entry to CEO with queries field. next_action mentions /deep or /deep-strict.

assertions.name: escalates
assertions.text: escalations list contains entry with file == 'ceo_escalation'

assertions.name: queries_present
assertions.text: escalation entry has non-empty queries list

evals.expected_output: axis-01 (quadratic loops) flags the nested for-for pattern. Suggestion non-empty.

evals.prompt: give a holistic overview of evals/fixtures/multi_file_repo
evals.expected_output: Per-file summaries plus up to 5 global themes. Artifacts use axis == 'file_summary' and 'global_theme'.

evals.prompt: find code that's defined but never used in tests/fixtures/sample_repo
evals.expected_output: Supervisor classifies as deadcode despite slightly different phrasing.

evals.prompt: summarize what this repository does as a whole: evals/fixtures/multi_file_repo
evals.expected_output: Supervisor classifies as synthesis (overview / holistic intent).

evals.prompt: what changed between Pydantic 2 and Pydantic 3, with sources
evals.expected_output: Supervisor classifies as research and the artifact is a CEO escalation.

metadata.notes: Thresholds align with verdict_mapper in ai-pipeline-audit. Each eval is independent; failures should be diagnosed individually before tightening thresholds.
